channel.title: LLM Timeline — AMD Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from AMD.

item.title: Instella-3B (AMD)
item.description: Parameters: Instella-3B License: open Type: model "trained from scratch on AMD Instinct™ MI300X GPUs. Instella models outperform existing fully open models of similar sizes and achieve competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art open-weight models such as Llama-3.2-3B, Gemma-2-2B, and Qwen-2.5-3B, including their instruction-tuned counterparts."

item.title: AMD OLMo (AMD)
item.description: Parameters: AMD OLMo License: open Type: model 1 billion parameter LMs trained from scratch using 1.3T tokens on a cluster of AMD Instinct MI250 GPUs.

item.title: AMD-Llama-135m (AMD)
item.description: Parameters: AMD-Llama-135m License: open Type: model Small language model (SLM). Trained on AMD Instinct™ MI250 accelerators. "Pretrain Dataset: We employed the SlimPajama and Project Gutenberg dataset to pretrain the 135M model. Project Gutenberg is a library of over 70,000 free eBooks approximately. This sums up to 670B tokens"
